settings.title: Aesthetic Acupuncture
settings.description: A natural facial rejuvenation treatment designed to improve skin tone, stimulate collagen production, reduce facial tension, and support healthy, radiant skin from within.

settings.title: Allergies & Skin Conditions
settings.description: Supportive treatments designed to help manage allergies, hay fever, inflammation, immune imbalance, and stress-related skin reactions while promoting overall wellbeing and balance.

settings.question: Is acupuncture safe during pregnancy?
settings.answer: Yes. Gentle acupuncture treatments can safely support many stages of pregnancy when performed by a qualified practitioner.

settings.question: Can acupuncture support fertility treatments such as IVF?
settings.answer: Acupuncture is often used alongside IVF and fertility treatments to support relaxation, hormonal balance, and overall wellbeing.

settings.question: How many sessions are usually recommended?
settings.answer: Every individual is different. Treatment frequency depends on your wellness goals, health history, and stage of care.

settings.question: What should I expect during my first consultation?
settings.answer: Your first session includes a personalized consultation, wellness assessment, and treatment plan tailored to your needs.

settings.question: Are treatments personalized?
settings.answer: Yes. Every treatment is customized to support your body, symptoms, and overall wellness journey.

settings.question: Do I need previous experience with acupuncture?
settings.answer: Not at all. Treatments are designed to feel calm, supportive, and comfortable for first-time clients.

settings.title: Holistic Support
settings.text: We focus on long-term balance, not temporary symptom relief.

settings.title: Calm & Restorative Experience
settings.text: A peaceful environment designed for comfort and healing.

settings.title: Personalized Care
settings.text: Every treatment is tailored to your body and wellness goals.
